creator: cris@gufi.org
text:
net/samba-pdbsql doesn't compile, it exits with following error:

===>  Building for samba-pdbsql-0.3.1_1
cc -Wall -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -I/usr/local/include/mysql -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/include -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/ubiqx -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/popt -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/lib/replace -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/tdb/include -I/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/librpc -fPIC -c pdb_multi.c 
In file included from /usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/include/includes.h:106,
                 from pdb_multi.c:29:
/usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.31/source/lib/replace/system/iconv.h:39:19: error: iconv.h: No such file or directory
pdb_multi.c:174: warning: 'enum SID_NAME_USE' declared inside parameter list
pdb_multi.c:174: warning: its scope is only this definition or declaration, which is probably not what you want
pdb_multi.c: In function 'multisam_sid_to_id':
pdb_multi.c:185: warning: passing argument 4 of '(*(data->methods + (struct pdb_methods **)((long unsigned int)i * 8ul)))->sid_to_id' from incompatible pointer type
pdb_multi.c: In function 'multisam_init':
pdb_multi.c:718: warning: assignment from incompatible pointer type
gmake: *** [pdb_multi.o] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba-pdbsql.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba-pdbsql.
